antiPatternCatalog.whyExpensive: Row-by-row evaluation; multiplies sub-queries in DirectQuery.
Clears filter context; forces full re-aggregation of the table.
Full table scan; cannot use dictionary indexes in the storage engine.
All branches are evaluated by the storage engine; no short-circuiting.
Creates virtual date tables; adds joins and prevents caching.
Multiple context transitions; each nesting adds a SQL subquery level.
Activates inactive relationship; forces alternate join path and prevents caching.
Cartesian explosion; creates huge virtual tables that multiply query cost.
Prevents single-pass aggregation; forces separate evaluation of numerator.

patternFamilies.name: Last Year Comparison Measures
exampleMeasures: Average Line Buy Final Destination LY
Average Sales Units Per Day LY
Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Quantity (Physical Returns) LY (Saleable NRSQP Cover)
patternFamilies.whySlow: DATE(YEAR()-1) inside SUMX is row-by-row scalar evaluation. FILTER(ALL(Date)) scans entire date table. IF() evaluates both branches.
requiredActions: Add LY_Date surrogate key column to Date table.
Replace SUMX with direct CALCULATE using the LY key.
Remove SWITCH(TRUE()) branching.

patternFamilies.name: Last Week Comparison Measures
exampleMeasures: Average Line Buy Final Destination LW
Average Sales Units Per Day LW
Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Quantity (Physical Returns) LW (Saleable NRSQP Cover)
patternFamilies.whySlow: Similar to LY/LM — bridge table lookup via CALCULATETABLE + FILTER(ALL(Date)).
requiredActions: Add LW surrogate key directly to Date table.
Remove bridge-table lookups.

patternFamilies.name: Average Weekly Cover Measures
exampleMeasures: Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Quantity (Physical Returns) (Saleable NRSQP Cover)
Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Quantity (Physical Returns) (Tradeable NRSQP Cover)
Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Value (Physical Returns) (Saleable NRSVP Cover)
Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Value (Physical Returns) (Tradeable NRSVP Cover)
Avg Weekly Retail Sales Buy Value (Saleable BV Cover)
patternFamilies.whySlow: ADDCOLUMNS materialises virtual tables repeatedly. FILTER over ADDCOLUMNS doubles the cost. AVERAGEX over virtual tables multiplies sub-queries.
requiredActions: Pre-aggregate weekly sales and stock into a weekly summary table.
Replace ADDCOLUMNS + FILTER with SUM / COUNT from the summary table.
Remove AVERAGEX by storing weekly averages directly.

patternFamilies.name: Half-to-Date Window Measures
patternFamilies.whySlow: Same pattern as WTD/MTD but scoped to half-year boundaries.
requiredActions: Add Is_HTD flag to Date table.
Replace FILTER(ALL(Date)) with CALCULATE using the boolean flag.

patternFamilies.name: Year-to-Date Window Measures
exampleMeasures: Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value - YTD
Gross Tradeable Buy Value Cover (Days) YTD
patternFamilies.whySlow: Same pattern as WTD/MTD but scoped to year boundaries.
requiredActions: Add Is_YTD flag to Date table.
Replace FILTER(ALL(Date)) with CALCULATE using the boolean flag.

patternFamilies.name: Week-to-Date Window Measures
patternFamilies.whySlow: SWITCH(TRUE()) evaluates all branches. SUMX iterates day-by-day. Nested CALCULATE inside SUMX. FILTER(ALL(Date)) forces full date table scans.
requiredActions: Add pre-computed flags to Date table: Is_WTD, Is_YD1, Is_LW, etc.
Replace SUMX + FILTER with simple CALCULATE using boolean flags.
Remove SWITCH(TRUE()) by splitting measures by grain.

patternFamilies.name: Month-to-Date Window Measures
exampleMeasures: Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value - MTD
Gross Tradeable Buy Value Cover (Days) MTD
patternFamilies.whySlow: Same pattern as WTD but scoped to month boundaries. FILTER(ALL(Date)) forces full date scans.
requiredActions: Add Is_MTD flag to Date table.
Replace FILTER(ALL(Date)) with CALCULATE using the boolean flag.

patternFamilies.name: Last Month Comparison Measures
exampleMeasures: Retail Sales Value T&R Mix of OB% LM
patternFamilies.whySlow: Same pattern as LY but for month offset. Bridge table lookups via CALCULATETABLE add extra joins.
requiredActions: Add LM surrogate key directly to Date table.
Remove bridge-table lookups.
Replace FILTER(ALL(Date)) with TREATAS or direct equality.

patternFamilies.name: Conversion Rate Measures
patternFamilies.whySlow: Typically divides two expensive aggregations, each generating separate DQ queries.
requiredActions: Use DIVIDE with pre-computed VARs.
Ensure numerator and denominator base measures share filter context where possible.

patternFamilies.name: Opening Balance Measures
exampleMeasures: Retail Sales Value T&R Mix of OB%
patternFamilies.whySlow: Uses bridge table lookups with FILTER(ALL(Date)) and IN operator.
requiredActions: Add opening balance date keys directly to Date table.
Replace FILTER(ALL(Date)) with TREATAS or direct equality.

patternFamilies.name: Last 7 Days Rolling Window Measures
patternFamilies.whySlow: DATESINPERIOD creates virtual tables. FILTER(ALL(Date)) scans full date table.
requiredActions: Add rolling 7-day window flags to Date table.
Replace DATESINPERIOD with direct boolean filters.

patternFamilies.name: Structural Pattern (ALL_FILTER+NESTED_CALC+ROW_FILTER+SWITCH_IF)
exampleMeasures: Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value - Prior Month
requiredActions: Analyse the specific DAX pattern and simplify.
Replace FILTER(ALL) with KEEPFILTERS or TREATAS.
Use VAR/RETURN to avoid repeated sub-expression evaluation.

patternFamilies.name: Structural Pattern (ALL_FILTER+ITERATOR+NESTED_CALC+SWITCH_IF)
exampleMeasures: Retail Sales Buy Value Mix Unit Cost %
Retail Sales Buy Value Mix WAC %
requiredActions: Analyse the specific DAX pattern and simplify.
Replace FILTER(ALL) with KEEPFILTERS or TREATAS.
Use VAR/RETURN to avoid repeated sub-expression evaluation.

patternFamilies.name: Structural Pattern (ALL_FILTER+ROW_FILTER+SWITCH_IF)
requiredActions: Analyse the specific DAX pattern and simplify.
Replace FILTER(ALL) with KEEPFILTERS or TREATAS.
Use VAR/RETURN to avoid repeated sub-expression evaluation.
